---
title: "Projects"
toc: false
listing:
  contents:
    - title: "Electricity markets graph"
      description: "A visualization tool for the actors in electricity markets."
      path: "https://etrieschman.github.io/electricity-markets-graph/"
    - title: "Garden"
      description: "Recommendation engine and dashboard for my home garden."
      path: "https://etrieschman.github.io/garden/"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: false
  filter-ui: false
  sort-ui: false
---
